# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  functionName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure Function
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

resources:
  - name: "[parameters('functionName')]"
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: functionapp
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', 'DefaultPlan')]"
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'storage')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      accessTier: Hot
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "2021-06-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'kv')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      sku:
        name: Standard
        family: A
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'sqlserver')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: adminuser
      administratorLoginPassword: "YourStrongP@ssw0rd!"
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'sqlserver', '/', parameters('functionName'), 'sqldb')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      sku:
        name: Basic
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: "2021-06-15-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'cosmosdb')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: GlobalDocumentDB
    properties:
      offerThroughputPolicy:
        incrementPercent: 100
      consistencyPolicy:
        defaultConsistencyLevel: Session

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'storage-contributor')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b7e6dc6d-f18c-4ed2-869e-38629797e471')]" # Storage Blob Data Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'keyvault-contributor')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b86a8fe4-a83e-47e8-a9cc-fd22c2d90431')]" # Key Vault Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'sql-contributor')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '9b7fa18d-3c2c-4580-a0a1-3cc6ac70106e')]" # SQL DB Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionName'), 'cosmosdb-contributor')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'a232010e-8f8d-4ff9-b6e3-f76b19adcfc5')]" # Cosmos DB Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
